title: BEM-863 mailbox poll after dispatch
objective:
Run script:
"""
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md')
result = Path('governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESULT.md')
last = Path('governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_LAST_CHECK.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
finals = ['APPROVED', 'APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS', 'BLOCKED_WITH_REASON']
status = None
for item in finals:
    if item in text:
        status = item
        break
if status:
    result.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    result.write_text('# BEM-859 protocol alignment result\nStatus: ' + status + '\nSource: governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(result))
    ops_applied.append('Claude final status found after Curator dispatch')
else:
    last.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    last.write_text('# BEM-859 mailbox last check\nStatus: WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_RESPONSE\nSource: governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md\nInterval: 60 seconds\nAfter: BEM863 Curator dispatch\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(last))
    ops_applied.append('waiting for Claude after Curator dispatch')
"""
No issue comments.
